note: Extension import-ban no-new-rot baseline. `hostInternal`/`crossExtension` = CURRENT @/ or cross-extension coupling tolerated until the decoupling sweep removes it. `sdkOnly` = CURRENT non-SDK first-party/sibling-vendor code coupling (deps + source imports incl. `import type`) tolerated until the connector sweep migrates each onto `ctx`; the canonical rule is SDK-packages-only.
